Search the oa-server codebase at D:\project\info-gitlab\oa\oa-server for the extractSlots API endpoint or the slot extraction prompt logic related to daily report AI chat. Look for:
1. The route/controller handling extractSlots
2. The prompt/system message that instructs the AI how to parse slots (member_type, members, period, etc.)
3. Any logic that distinguishes between group names vs member names

Search keywords: extractSlots, extract_slots, slotExtract, slot_extract, dailyReport AI, 日报助手, member_type, available_groups

Return the full relevant code sections with file paths and line numbers.
